title: Smoky Spicy Tortilla Wrap
description: A bold and low-carb Polish dish featuring smoky flavors and a spicy kick served in corn tortillas, perfect for an adventurous meal.

ingredients.name: 2 tablespoons olive oil
ingredients.amount: for cooking tortillas and wrapping the fillings

instructions: Fold each tortilla in half and place them seam side down on a baking sheet. Brush with olive oil and sprinkle with smoked paprika, cumin, chili powder, and garlic powder.
Bake for about 2-3 minutes or until lightly golden brown, flipping once halfway through cooking time.
While the tortillas are heating up, mix together the green peppers, cheese (if using), cilantro, lime juice (if using), and olive oil in a small bowl to create your filling mixture.
Place about 1/4 cup of the filling on each tortilla. Roll tightly from one side to close around the fillings, pressing lightly with fingers or a fork to seal.
Serve warm as a low-carb, spicy, gooey meal.
